---
name: Feature request
about: Propose something new — we want to hear it
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## The problem

What are you trying to do that the framework currently makes hard or impossible? Be specific — "I want to X but I can't because Y" is more useful than "it would be nice if".

## Proposed solution

What would you add or change? Rough API sketch, new adapter method, CLI command — whatever level of detail you have.

```typescript
// example interface / API sketch
```

## Alternatives you've considered

What have you tried? What workarounds exist today? Why do they fall short?

## Who benefits

Is this specific to your product integration, or does it generalize? If it generalizes, describe the broader use case.

## Are you willing to contribute a PR?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to implement this
- [ ] Yes, with guidance
- [ ] No, but I'll test it

## Additional context

Anything else — related issues, prior discussions, external references.
